title: Dekton Professional Paint & Plaster Mixer – Spiral Paddle for 1/2" Drill & Larger – Hex Shank – Mixes Paint, Plaster, Cement – Reduces Splatters – Up to 20 litres
features: Heavy-Duty Spiral Mixer – Built for fast, thorough mixing of paint, plaster, cement, and other materials with minimal effort.
Fits Most Standard Drills – Designed to work with 1/2" and larger electric drills; quick to attach and ready to use in seconds.
Hex Shank for Strong Grip – Hexagonal shaft ensures a tight fit in your drill chuck, preventing slipping during high-speed mixing.
Clean & Controlled Mixing – Engineered to reduce splattering and spills, helping you maintain a tidy workspace.
Mixes Up to 20 Litres – Perfect for small to medium batches; handles up to 20 litres of paint, plaster, or cement efficiently.
description: Transform your painting and plastering projects with the DEKTON Paint & Plaster Mixer, a robust mixing tool designed to fit 1/2" and larger drills. This versatile mixer efficiently handles volumes up to 20 litres, making it perfect for both small touch-ups and larger renovation projects. The thoughtfully engineered mixing head ensures thorough blending and a smooth, consistent finish whether you're working with paint or plaster. Constructed with durability in mind, this mixer features a sturdy design that's built to last. The mixer's professional-grade construction delivers reliable performance for both DIY enthusiasts and trade professionals, helping achieve professional-quality results with minimal effort. Simple to attach and operate, this essential tool streamlines your mixing process and helps achieve the perfect consistency every time.
